key_observations: Capital drawdown: 500 → 404.81 (-19%) with only 1 resolved trade (loss)
Trader execution stalled: last run 58min ago vs 5min expected cron schedule
4 open positions with zero activity in last 24h suggests execution or market access issue
review.calibration_check: Insufficient resolved trades (1 total, 0 in 24h) to assess probability model calibration.
recommended_actions: Investigate trader execution delay immediately - cron failure or API connectivity issue
Review the 1 resolved losing trade: verify my_prob calculation and edge threshold (avg_edge_at_entry=4.0 may be too aggressive)
Halt new trades until execution pipeline confirmed healthy and at least 5 resolved trades available for calibration
review.summary: HALT: 19% drawdown, trader stalled (58min since last run), only 1 resolved trade (loss). Execution pipeline compromised - investigate cron/API before resuming.
